span.p:
Initialize:
iteration_count = 0
operations = empty
No previous context

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Continue:
Increment iteration_count
Pass previous_iteration_summary
Pass previous_iteration_plan
Include existing_operations

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Call LLM with:
HTML content
Iteration context
Operation limit = 10
Hierarchical priorities

span.p:

Remove headings

span.p:

Iteration metadata

span.p:

Show iteration summary
